title: AI Fundamentals for Business Professionals
description: A comprehensive introduction to artificial intelligence, covering core concepts, practical applications, and responsible usage for non-technical professionals.

modules.title: What is AI?
modules.description: Understand the basics of artificial intelligence, machine learning, and generative AI.

modules.title: LLMs and Generative AI
modules.description: Learn how large language models work and what they can do.

modules.title: AI in the Enterprise
modules.description: Explore how organizations are using AI and what governance looks like.

modules.title: Hands-on: First AI Experience
modules.description: Try your first AI tools and learn prompt engineering basics.

title: Building AI Applications with LangChain
description: Learn to build production-ready AI applications using the LangChain framework, from chains to agents.

modules.title: LangChain Foundations
modules.description: Set up your environment and learn the core building blocks.

modules.title: Chains and Prompts
modules.description: Build multi-step AI workflows with prompt templates and output parsers.

modules.title: Memory and Context
modules.description: Implement conversation memory and context management.

modules.title: Building AI Agents
modules.description: Create agents that can use tools and make decisions.

title: Advanced Prompt Engineering Techniques
description: Master advanced prompt engineering for complex tasks including multi-step reasoning, tool use, and structured output.

modules.title: Prompt Design Patterns
modules.description: Learn proven patterns for effective prompt engineering.

modules.title: Chain of Thought & Reasoning
modules.description: Techniques for eliciting multi-step reasoning from models.

modules.title: Structured Output & Validation
modules.description: Get reliable structured outputs with validation and error handling.

modules.title: Evaluation & Optimization
modules.description: Measure prompt quality and iteratively improve results.
